guildInfo.about: Kaizen is a chill but serious Horde raiding guild pushing into 25-man progression content on TBC Classic. We're building a solid, consistent roster of players who show up prepared, respect each other's time, and want to actually clear content — without the toxicity. If that sounds like you, come hang.
guildInfo.recruitment:
We are actively building our 25-man roster and looking for reliable, raid-ready players.

Current loot system:
2 Soft Reserves · MS > OS + 1

All specs considered — reach out on Discord if you're interested in running with us.
guildInfo.lootRules:
2 Soft Reserves (SR) — each raider may reserve up to 2 items per raid week.
MS > OS — main spec rolls beat off spec rolls on all items.
+1 Rule — once you win a main spec item, you go to the back of the line for subsequent drops that night.
